CustomField.formula: CASE( WEEKDAY(Start_Date__c), 1, (Start_Date__c) + CEILING(Days__c) - 1 + FLOOR((Days__c-1)/5)*2, 2, (Start_Date__c) + CEILING(Days__c) - 1 + FLOOR((Days__c)/5)*2, 3, (Start_Date__c) + CEILING(Days__c) - 1 + FLOOR((Days__c+1)/5)*2, 4, (Start_Date__c) + CEILING(Days__c) - 1 + FLOOR((Days__c+2)/5)*2, 5, (Start_Date__c) + CEILING(Days__c) - 1 + FLOOR((Days__c+3)/5)*2, 6, (Start_Date__c) + CEILING(Days__c) - 1 + CEILING((Days__c)/5)*2, 7, (Start_Date__c) - IF(Days__c - 1>0,1,0) + CEILING(Days__c) - 1 + CEILING((Days__c)/5)*2, null)
CustomField.label: End Date
